content: Create TypeScript types for scenario builder frontend
note: Implemented as JSX/JS (no .ts/.tsx files exist in this codebase)

content: Create useScenarioBuilder.ts hook for scenario creation and editing
note: Implemented as useScenarioBuilder.js — full state management, save/publish, versioning, offline fallback

content: Create useScenarioTemplates.ts hook for template management
note: Implemented as useScenarioTemplates.js — filtering, sorting, grouping by category

content: Build ScenarioTemplateGallery.tsx with filtering and search
note: Implemented as ScenarioTemplateGallery.jsx — family/category filters, search, 8 templates

content: Build ParameterConfigurator.tsx with organized parameter groups
note: Implemented as ParameterConfigurator.jsx — accordion groups, sliders, NGFS baseline markers, delta badges

content: Build TrajectoryVisualizer.tsx with interactive charts and editable points
note: Implemented as TrajectoryVisualizer.jsx — Recharts LineChart, EditableDot, EditPopover, data table

content: Build ScenarioImpactPreviewPanel.tsx with quick impact calculation
note: Implemented as ScenarioImpactPreviewPanel.jsx — calls /api/v1/monte-carlo/quick, DeltaBar, offline fallback
Implemented as ScenarioVersionTimeline.jsx — spine/dot timeline, diff display, restore button
Implemented as ScenarioComparisonView.jsx — param diff table, metric bar chart, 2 NGFS scenarios max

content: Build NGFSDataBrowser.tsx for data source management
note: Implemented as NGFSDataBrowser.jsx — 9 NGFS variables, trajectory preview chart, Import to Scenario
Implemented as ScenarioBuilderWizard.jsx — 5 steps: Template, Parameters, Trajectory, Preview, Review

content: Add routes and test scenario builder components
note: Routes wired into App.js: /scenario-builder-v2 and /scenario-gallery. Nav entries added to Scenarios & Data group.
